rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Implementation-level signal routing should be expressed through assignments in the implementation annex.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and port directions when inserting AGREE contracts.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE expressions.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in the model.
Do not assume event ports are numeric; only use data values provided by the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL ports or properties in AGREE expressions unless they are explicitly typed or available in the current scope.
Do not encode Boolean or event ports as numeric values in AGREE contracts.
